notes: Downloads always land in your Downloads folder and open right up, batches download in one click, and mixing keeps your story in the right order.
_urls: urls are GitHub Release assets (stable, public, direct .exe/.dmg) and sha256 pins the exact binary - the 2.9.8+ updater verifies the download against it before offering to install. Assets use customer-friendly names (Remixa-Windows.exe / Remixa-Mac.dmg); the release TAG carries the version. mac is EMPTY this round (no new dmg was built) so Mac users see no update banner; when the owner builds the 2.9.19 dmg on the Mac, upload it to the same v2.9.19 release and fill this block.
